original: a pouch with a number of variously poisoned throwing darts
context: <<POS:06588564>> ase(e.longName)),e.description='a pouch with a number of variously poisoned throwing darts'

original: Purloined from a nuka raider in the Radwoods, this small pouch has a number of slender throwing darts with small, needle-like tips of the type she uses in battle. Unfortunately, the poison has been on them for a while, so it’s likely not as potent as when they were used against you. Even less fortunately: none of the darts are labeled, so it’s anyone’s guess which of her various poisons each one is coated in.
context: <<POS:06588635>> oned throwing darts",e.tooltip='Purloined from a nuka raider in the Radwoods, this small pou'

original: {var0}+{var1}+" considers it unwise to use a grenade outside of combat.
context: <<POS:06589608>> <<VARS:var0=t.capitalA,var1=t.short>> output(t.capitalA+t.short+" considers it unwise to use a grenade outside of combat.\n")

original: The dart hits home and, even weakened by time, the toxin-coating goes to work!
context: <<POS:06590835>> combatAppend("\n\nThe dart hits home and, even weakened by time, the toxin-coating goes to work!")

original: It seems you have no target to use your Nuka Dart on.
context: <<POS:06589812>> combatOutput("It seems you have no target to use your Nuka Dart on.",null,t)

original: {var1}.capitalize({var0})+" produces a nuka dart but with no target to use it on, "+{var2}.mfn("he","she","it")+" puts it away.
context: <<POS:06589888>> <<VARS:var0=t.getCombatName(),!1,var1=h.m,var2=t>> combatOutput(h.m.capitalize(t.getCombatName(),!1)+" produces a nuka dart but with no target to use it on, "+t.mfn("he","she","it")+" puts it away.",null,t)

original: You pull one of the nuka raider’s poisoned darts from its slender case very carefully and aim it carefully before sending the projectile soaring toward "+{var0}.getCombatName()+".
context: <<POS:06590124>> <<VARS:var0=e>> combatOutput("You pull one of the nuka raider’s poisoned darts from its slender case very carefully and aim it carefully before sending the projectile soaring toward "+e.getCombatName()+".",null,t)

original: {var1}.capitalize({var0})+" pulls one of the nuka raider’s poisoned darts from its slender case very carefully and aim it carefully before sending the projectile soaring toward its target!
context: <<POS:06590358>> <<VARS:var0=t.getCombatName(),!1,var1=h.m>> combatOutput(h.m.capitalize(t.getCombatName(),!1)+" pulls one of the nuka raider’s poisoned darts from its slender case very carefully and aim it carefully before sending the projectile soaring toward its target!",null,t)

original: {var1}.capitalize({var0})+" produces one of the nuka raider’s poisoned darts and carefully sends it in the direction of "+{var2}.getCombatName()+"!
